summary: Completed comprehensive testing of story mode implementation with 5 themed scenarios. All navigation, gameplay, and integration features working correctly.
passed_tests: Home screen 'Mode Histoire' button navigates to /story
StorySelect screen shows 5 scenario cards with correct French titles
All scenario cards display title, subtitle, description, tags, chapter count, difficulty stars, chevron arrow
L'Ascension à la Cour navigates to /story/cour_royale with 'Chapitre 1 / 10'
La Conquête Corporate navigates to /story/entreprise with 'Chapitre 1 / 5'
Scenario headers show themed colors (gold for court, blue for corporate, etc.)
'← Scénarios' button returns to /story selection screen
Story gameplay works: choosing answers, feedback display, chapter advancement
Quiz mode starts correctly from home screen
Visual design and themed colors display correctly
